S&R Travel Blog

Exploring the world, one city at a time.

✈️ Travel Itinerary

  • July 4th - July 10th: Sebastian in South Korea (ICML 2026)
  • July 11th - July 20th: Sebastian in China (IMO 2026)
  • July 19th - July 24th: Sebastian & Rachel in China (Shanghai & Beijing)
  • July 25th - August 3rd: Sebastian & Rachel in Japan (Osaka, Kyoto, Hiroshima, Tokyo)
2026-04-28 China

Day 1 in Shanghai

Arrival in Shanghai and first impressions of this megacity.
2026-04-20 Korea

Seoul Adventures: Tradition Meets Tomorrow

Exploring the vibrant streets of Seoul, where ancient palaces stand next to towering skyscrapers.
2026-04-15 China

The Great Wall and Beijing Nights

Walking the ancient steps of the Great Wall and experiencing the neon glow of modern Beijing.
2026-04-10 Japan

Tokyo Lights and Peaceful Temples

Finding balance between the sensory overload of Akihabara and the quiet zen gardens of Kyoto.
